flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Utah Tech University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Utah Tech University are 27% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($44.6k vs $35.0k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Utah Tech University are 17% above 6-year earnings ($38.0k → $44.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Utah Tech University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (58.9% → 67.9%).
